Class PlayerShip

java.lang.Object
game.GameEntity
game.Ships.Ship
game.Ships.PlayerShip
public class PlayerShip extends Ship
Handles left/right movement, shooting cooldown, invincibility, and powerup effects.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    PlayerShip(Properties gameProps)
    Constructs PlayerShip by loading image, position, speed, cooldown, and invincibility image from properties.

    Method
    Description

    applyCooldownReduction()
    Reduces shooting cooldown Called by the Cooldown powerup

    applySpeedBoost()
    Doubles the player's speed.

    Draws the player ship.

    Resets all mutable attributes to initial values Called when starting a new game.

    Restores shooting cooldown to the original value Called by the Cooldown powerup on expiry.

    startInvincibility(int duration)
    Starts invincibility period for the given duration.
    void
    stopInvincibility()
    Immediately ends timed invincibility by zeroing the timer.

    Toggles dev-mode invincibility

    Updates the entity state each frame.

    moves the ship and ticks timers based on input.

  • Constructor Details

    • PlayerShip

      public PlayerShip(Properties gameProps)
      Constructs PlayerShip by loading image, position, speed, cooldown, and invincibility image from properties.
      Parameters:
      gameProps - the loaded game properties file

  • Method Details

    • update

      public void update(bagel.Input input, double actualSpeed)
      moves the ship and ticks timers based on input. Called by BattleScreen each frame.
      Parameters:
      input - the current frame's input
      actualSpeed - the current speed multiplier

    • update

      public void update(double actualSpeed)
      Description copied from class: GameEntity
      Updates the entity state each frame.
      Specified by:
      update in class GameEntity
      Parameters:
      actualSpeed - speed scaling factor

    • draw

      public void draw()
      Draws the player ship. If invincible, draws invincibility image on top
      Overrides:
      draw in class GameEntity

    • canShoot

      public boolean canShoot()
      Returns:
      true if the shooting cooldown has elapsed.

    • resetCoolDownTimer

      public void resetCoolDownTimer()

    • isInvincible

      public boolean isInvincible()

    • startInvincibility

      public void startInvincibility(int duration)
      Starts invincibility period for the given duration.
      Parameters:
      duration - number of frames invincibility lasts

    • stopInvincibility

      public void stopInvincibility()
      Immediately ends timed invincibility by zeroing the timer.

    • toggleDevInvincible

      public void toggleDevInvincible()
      Toggles dev-mode invincibility

    • getLives

      public Lives getLives()

    • applyCooldownReduction

      public void applyCooldownReduction()
      Reduces shooting cooldown Called by the Cooldown powerup

    • resetCooldown

      public void resetCooldown()
      Restores shooting cooldown to the original value Called by the Cooldown powerup on expiry.

    • applySpeedBoost

      public void applySpeedBoost()
      Doubles the player's speed. Called by the Engine powerup

    • resetSpeed

      public void resetSpeed()

    • reset

      public void reset()
      Resets all mutable attributes to initial values Called when starting a new game.
